turns.text: I feel so safe with you, like I've known you forever.
You're the only one who really sees me.
If you really cared, you'd cut off those friends who don't like me.
After everything I've sacrificed for us, how can you even think about leaving?
You're my most promising student.
Your parents don't understand you like I do.
If you want to succeed, you should only follow my method.
I feel so safe with you.
Promise you'll never leave?
Without you I'm nothing.
I don't usually give private lessons, but for you I will.
Real success requires total commitment to my method.
If you listen to others, you'll waste everything I've invested in you.
You're the only one I trust with this project.
I've put my reputation on the line for you.
After everything I've done for your career, this is how you repay me?
True patriots never stay silent.
If you stay silent, you're part of the problem.
I've risked everything. Now it's your turn to prove loyalty.
You're my best friend.
If you hang out with them, it really hurts me.
After everything we've been through, how can you distance yourself?
I've already put my own money in to show trust.
Don't miss out or you'll regret it forever.
After all the guidance I've given you, walking away would be a betrayal.
